{{Quote|The denizens of Rock Squadron all struck me as what Rogue Squadron would have been had we lost to the Empire and spent our time dirtside in seedy towns, waiting for a chance to plunder pitiful folks who were worse off than we were.|[[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]]|<ref name="I, Jedi">''[[I, Jedi]]''</ref>}}
'''Rock Squadron''' was the lowest-ranked of the five [[Khuiumin Survivors]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]].

Its [[Commander/Legends|commander]] was originally [[Nakk Kech]], but upon his [[Death/Legends|death]] command was turned over to [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] who was posing as [[Jenos Idanian]] at the time. Upon Horn's transfer to [[Bolt Squadron (Khuiumin Survivors)|Bolt]] command of Rock Squadron was given to [[Timmser]]. Other members included [[Caet Shrovl]], [[Blook]], and [[Yander (pirate)|Yander]].

It was teamed with [[Pike Squadron]] at the [[Battle of Xa Fel (11 ABY)|Second Battle of Xa Fel]].

==Appearances==
